title: torch.arange dtype/step coupling triggers SIGFPE

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Use a non-integer positive step together with dtype=torch.int64.
expected: The API should either generate a valid integer tensor or reject the dtype/step combination with a Python-level RuntimeError.
observed: The process terminates with Floating point exception.
